rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §21.0489 governs early childhood teacher certification requirements. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter and share no operative dependency.
quote: To ensure that there are teachers with special training in early childhood education focusing on prekindergarten through grade three, the board shall establish an early childhood certificate.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to educator certification, not property tax or homestead exemptions.
